title: Community Development Council (CDC) Vouchers
text:
Community Development Council (CDC) Vouchers - SupportGoWhere
Community Development Council (CDC) Vouchers
Share link
Can be used at participating heartland merchants, hawkers, and supermarkets.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Eligible Singaporean households can claim their vouchers via RedeemSG website
No application needed
Collapse all sections
About this support

Each Singaporean household can claim $500 in CDC Vouchers in June 2026

The vouchers are allocated equally for spending at participating heartland merchants, hawkers, and supermarkets

Who is this for?

Household with at least 1 Singapore Citizen

How to apply?

No application needed

Find out how to claim your CDC vouchers

Where can I find help?

View more details

PA Contact Centre: 6225 5322

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest Community Centre/Club

Scheme last updated 07 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
